descriptionText: If you are considering a yacht with proven capability and spacious accommodation, the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 may well meet your requirements. Built in 1993 and currently in good condition, this vessel is a practical choice for sailors seeking reliability, comfort, and safety. The Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 has classic lines and a robust build, benefitting from ferrocement construction, which offers durability and impressive longevity when looked after properly.Sail handling is streamlined thanks to features such as in-boom furling for the mainsail and roller reefing systems for both the jib and genoa. With four manual winches and one electric winch, even a small crew can operate her efficiently. The aluminium mast is sturdy and practical, matching her carefully considered rigging. Her in-boom furling mainsail and roller reefing headsails show that convenience was an important aspect of the design.The engine, a reliable Yanmar 4-stroke outboard with 65 HP, ensures safe and steady propulsion when needed. Coupled with a 180-litre diesel tank, range and autonomy are more than sufficient for longer trips or coastal navigation. The vessel's 80-litre freshwater tank, though not large, is practical for short passages and manageable with routine resupply stops.Below is a simple list of specifications for the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993:Year built: 1993Condition: Very goodLength x Beam: 14.50 m x 4.50 mDisplacement: 10,000 kgCE Marking: A - OffshoreMaterial: FerrocementSteering: Wheel steeringKeel type: Keel/CenterboardMaximum persons: 7Number of cabins: 4Number of berths: 7Freshwater tank: 80 litresPropulsion: 4-stroke outboard motorEngine: YanmarEngine power: 1 x 65 HP / 48 kWFuel capacity: 180 litres dieselMast material: AluminiumMast height: 14.50 mMainsail: In-boom furlingJib: Roller reefingGenoa: Roller reefingWinches: 4 manual, 1 electricEquipment:GeneratorBatteryAnchorShore powerGeneratorBatteryAnchorBilge pumpLife raftWatermakerCompassGPSAutopilotFish finderVHF radioWind gaugeAISStoveOvenSinkFridgeFlybridge coverSwim ladderDeck showerCockpit tableTeak cockpitAntifoulingIf you’re considering an offshore-capable yacht in good condition with ample living space and manageable sailing systems, the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 is a vessel worthy of attention. She is well-equipped for family cruising or group adventures on the sea, ready for her next chapter under new ownership. For those looking to step aboard a reliable and practical yacht, viewing the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 is recommended.
descriptionHtml:
If you are considering a yacht with proven capability and spacious accommodation, the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 may well meet your requirements. Built in 1993 and currently in good condition, this vessel is a practical choice for sailors seeking reliability, comfort, and safety. The Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 has classic lines and a robust build, benefitting from ferrocement construction, which offers durability and impressive longevity when looked after properly.

Sail handling is streamlined thanks to features such as in-boom furling for the mainsail and roller reefing systems for both the jib and genoa. With four manual winches and one electric winch, even a small crew can operate her efficiently. The aluminium mast is sturdy and practical, matching her carefully considered rigging. Her in-boom furling mainsail and roller reefing headsails show that convenience was an important aspect of the design.

The engine, a reliable Yanmar 4-stroke outboard with 65 HP, ensures safe and steady propulsion when needed. Coupled with a 180-litre diesel tank, range and autonomy are more than sufficient for longer trips or coastal navigation. The vessel's 80-litre freshwater tank, though not large, is practical for short passages and manageable with routine resupply stops.

Below is a simple list of specifications for the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993:

  • Year built: 1993
  • Condition: Very good
  • Length x Beam: 14.50 m x 4.50 m
  • Displacement: 10,000 kg
  • CE Marking: A - Offshore
  • Material: Ferrocement
  • Steering: Wheel steering
  • Keel type: Keel/Centerboard
  • Maximum persons: 7
  • Number of cabins: 4
  • Number of berths: 7
  • Freshwater tank: 80 litres
  • Propulsion: 4-stroke outboard motor
  • Engine: Yanmar
  • Engine power: 1 x 65 HP / 48 kW
  • Fuel capacity: 180 litres diesel
  • Mast material: Aluminium
  • Mast height: 14.50 m
  • Mainsail: In-boom furling
  • Jib: Roller reefing
  • Genoa: Roller reefing
  • Winches: 4 manual, 1 electric

Equipment:

  • Generator
  • Battery
  • Anchor
  • Shore power
  • Generator
  • Battery
  • Anchor
  • Bilge pump

  • Compass
  • GPS
  • Autopilot
  • Fish finder
  • VHF radio
  • Wind gauge
  • AIS
  • Stove
  • Oven
  • Sink
  • Fridge
  • Flybridge cover
  • Swim ladder
  • Deck shower
  • Cockpit table
  • Teak cockpit
  • Antifouling

If you’re considering an offshore-capable yacht in good condition with ample living space and manageable sailing systems, the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 is a vessel worthy of attention. She is well-equipped for family cruising or group adventures on the sea, ready for her next chapter under new ownership. For those looking to step aboard a reliable and practical yacht, viewing the Morgante Biaisi for sale 1993 is recommended.
